name: Honey Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until light.
2. Gradually add sugar and beat until thick.
3. Incorporate honey and mix in all dry ingredients alternately with the coffee.
4. Add raisins and pour batter into an oiled or greased large pan.
5. Sprinkle almonds on top.
6. Bake at a moderate temperature for 30-45 minutes. This yields almost 3 pounds of cake.
